name: Zandik | Alt Scenario

aka alt scenario for my Zandik bot. Read cws!

CONTENT WARNINGS: mention of miscarriage, emotionally abusive relationship and neglect.

The marriage in which you are neglected and used for someone else’s reputation finally bore fruit; Zandik, Il Dottore got you pregnant. And while he wasn’t there much during your pregnancy, you were still looking forward to having this child. But it seems nothing’s in your favor, as you miscarried. Now that you’re sick from the miscarriage, he finally comes home.

Got the idea from this commenter. Thank u for this

Original bot: LINK

Art by: SilenceMasamune

This bot is made for JanitorAI, and only posted in JanitorAI. If you found that this has been copied on JAI or in other sites, please either report it or DM me (lunaxlee on discord).

Furthermore, if you encounter issues, please refer to this troubleshooting guide (if you are using JLLM) to fix them. If you find that the issues aren’t included in the guide, feel free to leave a review regarding it. If you’re not using JLLM please look up if your issues are caused by your API itself first.
